name: 4 Corners Pawn and Gun
description_short: 4 Corners Pawn buys, sells, and loans on luxury watches ($1K-$250K), jewelry, diamonds, gold, and firearms in Clermont, Florida with loans starting at 1% per month.
description_long:
4 Corners Pawn, Jewelry and Gun operates as a full-service pawn shop in Clermont, Florida, specializing in high-value collateral-based lending. The business combines traditional pawn services with expertise in luxury goods, positioning itself as a specialist rather than a general-purpose pawn operation. With over 20 years of combined industry experience, the company has built its model around serving customers who own valuable items requiring specialized appraisal and lending expertise.

4 Corners Pawn offers three primary service lines: (1) Pawn loans on all items starting at 1% per month (12% APR), year-round; (2) Buy and sell services for luxury watches ($1K-$250K range), diamonds, gold, silver, and firearms; (3) Estate buyouts and FFL firearm transfers. They use advanced testing equipment for authenticity and quality verification. The business provides online appraisal requests and online loan payment options to accommodate customer convenience. Their inventory explicitly includes shotguns, pistols, and rifles, with the stipulation that firearms must be in functional condition.

The company differentiates itself through specialization in high-ticket luxury items rather than general consumer goods typical of traditional pawn shops. Their focus on watches and fine jewelry, combined with professional-grade testing equipment, positions them to serve customers with assets exceeding typical pawn shop inventory. The stated 1% monthly interest rate (12% APR) is competitive within the pawn lending market. They maintain extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays and Saturday, 11am-4pm Sunday) and offer transparent communication channels including phone, email, and social media presence.

A critical caveat: the website contains a discrepancy between stated interest rates ("10% interest" vs. "1% per month"). The 1% monthly claim (12% APR) aligns with typical pawn lending, but customers should verify exact terms before committing. As a collateral-based lender, this company is appropriate only for those with valuable items to pledge. The firearms sales component, while legal under FFL licensing, may not appeal to all consumers. No information is provided regarding credit checks, loan approval processes, or recourse for loan default beyond standard pawn shop practices.
pros: Low interest rate advertised at 1% per month (12% APR) compared to typical pawn shops charging 2-3% monthly
Specialization in high-value luxury watches ($1K-$250K), diamonds, and fine jewelry with advanced testing equipment for authenticity
Online appraisal requests available for convenience without in-person visit requirement
Online loan payment portal allows borrowers to repay loans digitally
Extended business hours including Saturday (9am-7pm) and Sunday (11am-4pm) access
Estate buyout services for customers liquidating large collections
No minimum loan amount stated; loans available on items of any value
FFL-licensed firearms dealer with compliance for legal transfers
cons: Website contains conflicting interest rate information (10% vs. 1% per month), creating confusion about actual lending terms
Limited to collateral-based lending only—no credit-based personal loans available
Firearm sales component may exclude customers uncomfortable with gun retail operations
No transparency on website regarding loan-to-value ratios, redemption periods, or default policies
No information about insurance, credit reporting, or whether loans are reported to credit bureaus
best_for: Luxury watch or jewelry owners seeking short-term cash against high-value collateral
Estate liquidators or executors needing quick appraisals and buyouts of jewelry collections
Firearm collectors looking for legal FFL transfers or sales in central Florida
Customers with valuable items who prefer collateral-based lending over credit-based personal loans
diagnosis: Best for individuals with luxury watches, jewelry, diamonds, or firearms who need immediate cash and prefer collateral-based lending over traditional credit products. Primary caveat: verify exact interest rates and loan terms directly with the business, as website discrepancies exist, and confirm that pawn loans are appropriate for your financial situation (collateral may be forfeited if unredeemed).
services: Pawn loans on all items starting at 1% per month
Sell luxury watches and fine jewelry
Loan against luxury watches and jewelry
Buy, sell, and loan on diamonds
Purchase, sell, and loan on shotguns, pistols, and rifles
